parameters.query:
SELECT json_build_object(
  'whales_30d', (
    SELECT json_agg(t) FROM (
      SELECT user_id::text,
             COUNT(*) AS orders,
             ROUND(SUM(total_amount)::numeric/100.0, 2) AS gmv_eur,
             MAX(created_at)::date::text AS last_order
      FROM public.orders
      WHERE status IN ('completed','paid','fulfilled','delivered')
        AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
        AND user_id IS NOT NULL
      GROUP BY user_id
      HAVING SUM(total_amount) >= 50000  -- ≥€500
      ORDER BY gmv_eur DESC LIMIT 10
    ) t
  ),
  'ym_whales_30d', (
    SELECT json_agg(t) FROM (
      SELECT
        COALESCE(buyer_info->>'lastName','?') || ' ' || COALESCE(buyer_info->>'firstName','') AS name,
        COUNT(*) AS orders,
        ROUND(SUM(items_total)::numeric/100.0, 0) AS rub
      FROM public.yandex_market_orders
      WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
        AND status IN ('delivered','DELIVERED')
      GROUP BY 1
      HAVING SUM(items_total) >= 30000 * 100
      ORDER BY rub DESC LIMIT 10
    ) t
  ),
  'partner_api_growth', (
    SELECT json_agg(t) FROM (
      SELECT user_id::text,
             COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days') AS orders_30d,
             COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '60 days' AND created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days') AS orders_30_60d,
             ROUND(SUM(total_amount) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days')::numeric/100.0, 2) AS gmv_30d
      FROM public.orders
      WHERE channel = 'partner' AND user_id IS NOT NULL
        AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '60 days'
      GROUP BY user_id
      HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days') > 0
      ORDER BY gmv_30d DESC LIMIT 5
    ) t
  ),
  'b2b_signed_count', 0,  -- to be filled later when we have a contracts table
  'recent_silent_whales', (
    SELECT json_agg(t) FROM (
      SELECT user_id::text,
             ROUND(SUM(total_amount)::numeric/100.0, 2) AS lifetime_gmv,
             MAX(created_at)::date::text AS last_order,
             EXTRACT(day FROM NOW() - MAX(created_at))::int AS silent_days
      FROM public.orders
      WHERE status IN ('completed','paid','fulfilled','delivered')
        AND user_id IS NOT NULL
      GROUP BY user_id
      HAVING SUM(total_amount) >= 100000  -- ≥€1K lifetime
        AND EXTRACT(day FROM NOW() - MAX(created_at)) BETWEEN 14 AND 60
      ORDER BY lifetime_gmv DESC LIMIT 5
    ) t
  )
) AS result;
